review_text: The app keeps freezing on the payment screen. I lost my money and the support is not responding!
Great update! The interface looks much cleaner and the app is loading faster now.
Why is there no dark mode option? Please add this feature in the next update.
The subscription cost is way too high for a basic tool like this. Disappointed.
Love this platform! It is very easy to use and helps me organize my team workflows.
Every time I open the app, it crashes immediately. Please fix this bug.
The customer service team was helpful and resolved my billing issues within 10 minutes.
